findings.message: Multiple root-level HTML files with data-composition-id: caption-skin.html, index.html. The runtime may discover both as entry points, causing duplicate audio playback.
findings.fixHint: A project should have exactly one root index.html with data-composition-id. Remove or rename extra files.

findings.message: Root composition is missing `data-composition-id`.
findings.fixHint: Add a stable `data-composition-id` to the entry composition wrapper.

findings.message: Root composition is missing `data-width` or `data-height`.
findings.fixHint: Set numeric `data-width` and `data-height` on the entry composition root.

findings.message: GSAP tweens overlap on "__unresolved__" for p between 3.20s and 6.00s.
findings.fixHint: Shorten the earlier tween, move the later tween, or add `overwrite: "auto"`.
findings.snippet: tl.to("__unresolved__", { p: Math.PI * 2 * 8, duration: 6, ease: "none" }, 0) tl.to("__unresolved__", { p: Math.PI * 2 * 1.6, duration: 2.8, ease: "none" }, 3.2)

findings.fixHint: Add a stable `data-composition-id` to the entry composition wrapper.

findings.message: Root composition is missing `data-width` or `data-height`.
findings.fixHint: Set numeric `data-width` and `data-height` on the entry composition root.

findings.message: This HTML composition file has 325 lines. Smaller sub-compositions are easier to read, iterate on, and diff.
findings.fixHint: Split this sub-composition further into smaller .html files, then mount them from the parent with data-composition-src so each file stays small enough to inspect, revise, and validate independently.

findings.message: Font family used without @font-face declaration: -apple-system. These are not in the auto-resolved font list, so the renderer cannot supply them automatically. Text will fall back to a generic font, producing incorrect typography in the video.
findings.fixHint: Add @font-face { font-family: '...'; src: url('capture/assets/fonts/...woff2'); } for each font family, pointing to the captured .woff2 files.

findings.fixHint: Set numeric `data-width` and `data-height` on the entry composition root.

findings.message: GSAP tweens overlap on ".labels" for scale between 0.00s and 0.12s.
findings.fixHint: Shorten the earlier tween, move the later tween, or add `overwrite: "auto"`.
findings.snippet: tl.to(".labels", { scale: 0.97, duration: 0.12, ease: "power1.in" }, 0) tl.to(".labels", { scale: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: "back.out(1.7)" }, 0)

findings.message: GSAP tweens overlap on "__unresolved__" for scale between 0.00s and 0.14s.
findings.fixHint: Shorten the earlier tween, move the later tween, or add `overwrite: "auto"`.
findings.snippet: tl.fromTo("__unresolved__", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 0.9, duration: 0.14, ease: "power1.in" }, 0) tl.to("__unresolved__", { scale: 1, duration: 0.5, ease: "__raw:`back.out(${BOUNCE})`" }, 0)

findings.message: GSAP tweens overlap on "#node" for scale between 4.72s and 4.72s.
findings.fixHint: Shorten the earlier tween, move the later tween, or add `overwrite: "auto"`.
findings.snippet: tl.fromTo("#node", { scale: 1.07, duration: 0.32, ease: "power2.out" }, 4.4) tl.to("#node", { scale: 1, duration: 0.5, ease: "power2.inOut" }, 4.72)

findings.message: Composition loads fonts from fonts.googleapis.com. External font requests fail in sandboxed/offline renders and add latency. Use local @font-face declarations with captured .woff2 files instead.
findings.fixHint: Replace the Google Fonts <link> or @import with @font-face { font-family: '...'; src: url('capture/assets/fonts/Font.woff2'); } pointing to captured font files.

findings.message: ".bar" has CSS `transform: scaleY(0)` and a GSAP tween animates scaleY. GSAP will overwrite the full CSS transform, discarding any translateX(-50%) centering or CSS scale value.
findings.fixHint: Remove the transform from CSS and use tl.fromTo('.bar', { xPercent: -50, x: -1000 }, { xPercent: -50, x: 0 }) so GSAP owns the full transform state. tl.fromTo is exempt from this rule.

findings.message: Composition loads fonts from fonts.googleapis.com. External font requests fail in sandboxed/offline renders and add latency. Use local @font-face declarations with captured .woff2 files instead.
findings.fixHint: Replace the Google Fonts <link> or @import with @font-face { font-family: '...'; src: url('capture/assets/fonts/Font.woff2'); } pointing to captured font files.

findings.message: Timeline "12-closing" uses unscoped selector ".chip" that will target elements in ALL compositions when bundled, causing data loss (opacity, transforms, etc.).
findings.fixHint: Scope the selector: `[data-composition-id="12-closing"] .chip` or use a unique id.
findings.snippet: tl.fromTo(".chip", { xPercent: -50, x: tx, y: ty, scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 1.1, ease: "power3.out" }, 0)
